_comment: Catalogue déclaratif des options Muse. Modifiable sans toucher au code. L'UI lit ce fichier via app/lib/muse-catalog.js et l'utilise pour construire les choix proposés à l'utilisateur dans les vues framing/mood/style. Les ids sont utilisés tels quels dans la construction du Prompt Maître Artistique (muse-prompt.js) — éviter de les renommer après mise en prod. Muse cible un studio 3D spécialisé en illustration immobilière : les prompts secondaires servent à constituer un MOODBOARD DE RÉFÉRENCES visuelles, jamais à générer le projet lui-même (qui sera modélisé sur plan par le studio).

supports.label: Bâche grand format
supports.context: diffusion finale · extérieur, vue de loin

supports.label: Affiche 4×3
supports.context: diffusion finale · extérieur, vue de loin

supports.label: Instagram story / Reel
supports.context: diffusion finale · mobile vertical plein écran

viewpoints.label: Vue aérienne · drone
viewpoints.narrative: Focus sur l'insertion urbaine, l'envergure du projet et la qualité d'intégration au paysage
viewpoints.prompt_anchor: aerial drone shot, slight tilt down, wide establishing view, architectural insertion into the surroundings

viewpoints.label: Vue piétonne · immersion
viewpoints.narrative: Ressenti de l'acheteur devant la façade, échelle humaine, qualité de la voie publique
viewpoints.prompt_anchor: eye-level street view, pedestrian perspective, building seen from the sidewalk, natural human scale

viewpoints.label: Vue intérieure · pièce de vie
viewpoints.narrative: Volumes, lumière naturelle, qualité des prestations, ambiance pièce à vivre
viewpoints.prompt_anchor: interior architectural photography, living room with natural light pouring in, generous volumes, high-end finishes

viewpoints.label: Vue détail · terrasse / extérieur
viewpoints.narrative: Atout extérieur : balcon, terrasse, jardin privatif, vue dégagée
viewpoints.prompt_anchor: close-up terrace and outdoor lifestyle, balcony with open view, plants, outdoor furniture, evening atmosphere

viewpoints.label: Vue macro · matériaux
viewpoints.narrative: Gros plan textures, matériaux, finitions, prestations haut de gamme
viewpoints.prompt_anchor: macro shot of architectural materials, shallow depth of field, natural light grazing texture, premium finishes

lights.prompt_anchor: warm golden hour light, long soft shadows, amber and gold tones, cinematic late afternoon sun

lights.prompt_anchor: deep azure blue sky, hard noon Mediterranean light, vivid saturated colors

lights.label: Heure bleue · crépuscule
lights.prompt_anchor: blue hour twilight, warm interior lights glowing against a deep blue exterior, urban serenity

lights.label: Nuit · ambiance signature
lights.prompt_anchor: night architectural photography, designed lighting accenting the façade, glowing interior windows

seasons.prompt_anchor: crisp winter light, low sun, long shadows

vegetations.label: Dense · camouflage
vegetations.prompt_anchor: lush dense vegetation, mature trees softening the architecture

vegetations.prompt_anchor: subtropical south-of-France vegetation, palms, agaves, bougainvillea

figurations.prompt_anchor: ambient family-oriented residential lifestyle suggestion, blurred silhouette in distance, no detailed facial features, editorial home-life mood

figurations.label: Profil acheteur jeunes actifs urbains
figurations.prompt_anchor: ambient urban-professional lifestyle suggestion, distant blurred silhouette, no detailed facial features, contemporary residential mood

figurations.label: Profil acheteur seniors CSP+
figurations.prompt_anchor: ambient refined-retiree lifestyle suggestion, distant blurred silhouette, no detailed facial features, calm upscale mood

figurations.label: Profil acheteur investisseur luxe
figurations.prompt_anchor: ambient luxury-buyer lifestyle suggestion, distant blurred silhouette, no detailed facial features, discreet affluent mood

figurations.label: Aucune figuration · architecture pure
figurations.prompt_anchor: no human figure, pure architectural composition, empty staged interior or exterior

styles.label: Réalisme cinématique
styles.prompt_anchor: cinematic realism, anamorphic lens look, shallow depth of field, color-graded like a feature film

styles.label: Editorial architectural
styles.prompt_anchor: editorial architectural photography in the style of Dezeen / Architectural Digest, clean composition, balanced symmetry

styles.label: Pictural · ambiance peinture
styles.prompt_anchor: painterly rendering, soft brushstroke quality, atmospheric and emotive, illustrative finish

styles.label: Documentaire authentique

styles.label: Aspirational glossy
styles.prompt_anchor: aspirational glossy advertising style, high contrast, vibrant saturation, premium real-estate campaign aesthetic

target_engines.label: Claude (Anthropic)
target_engines.note: Recommandé pour la qualité de structuration HTML

_comment_image_engines: Chaque moteur de génération d'images a sa propre syntaxe optimale. Midjourney/Flux acceptent les paramètres --ar/--style/--v et préfèrent les mots-clés séparés par virgules ; DALL-E, Imagen et Nano Banana préfèrent une prose narrative complète sans paramètres techniques. Le champ moodboard_grid décrit la formulation de grille à utiliser pour produire UNE planche d'ambiance complète en une seule génération (pratique standard des studios 3D : 1 moodboard cohérent vaut mieux que 4 images à assembler).

image_engines.label: Midjourney v8.1
image_engines.moodboard_grid: as a single cohesive moodboard composition arranged in a 3x2 grid of 6 panels separated by thin pale dividers
image_engines.style_hint: comma-separated keywords, dense and evocative, end with quality keywords (photorealistic, 8k, ultra-detailed, editorial photography), then the parameters block
image_engines.note: Le standard du marché 3D — excellent rendu des grilles moodboard

image_engines.label: Flux (Pro / Dev)
image_engines.moodboard_grid: as a single cohesive moodboard composition arranged in a 3x2 grid of 6 panels separated by thin pale dividers
image_engines.style_hint: rich descriptive prose mixed with comma-separated keywords, accepts --ar W:H at the end, no --v needed

image_engines.label: DALL-E 3 (via ChatGPT)
image_engines.moodboard_grid: presented as a single cohesive moodboard layout with six clearly separated panels arranged in two rows of three, each panel framed by a thin pale divider
image_engines.style_hint: full narrative prose like briefing a photographer, no technical parameters, mention the framing in words ('widescreen 3:2 moodboard format'), end with quality words integrated into the sentence
image_engines.note: Prompts en prose naturelle, refuse les paramètres techniques

image_engines.label: Gemini Imagen / Nano Banana (Google)
image_engines.moodboard_grid: presented as a single cohesive moodboard layout composed of six panels arranged in two rows of three, with thin pale dividers between panels
image_engines.style_hint: short, precise descriptive prose, mention the aspect ratio in words ('cinematic widescreen 3:2 moodboard layout'), prefer cautious neutral vocabulary to avoid safety filter triggers, integrate quality cues naturally ('professional editorial photograph, ultra-detailed')
image_engines.note: Filtres stricts — vocabulaire prudent, prose courte et claire

image_engines.label: Stable Diffusion (SDXL / SD3)
image_engines.moodboard_grid: as a single cohesive moodboard composition arranged in a 3x2 grid of 6 panels separated by thin pale dividers
image_engines.style_hint: comma-separated dense keyword stack like Midjourney, can append (negative prompt: text, watermark, blur), accepts --ar W:H
image_engines.note: Open-weights, fonctionne en local — ratio en paramètre
